svg.title: PMO agent query functional flow
svg.desc: Functional flowchart showing how a user question travels from the PMO UI through an AI agent, retrieves data from Vector DB, Neo4j, and Metastore, and returns a chart or answer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of cost questions can a user ask the PMO agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI agent parse the user query into structured intent?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent decide which data stores to query?')
sendPrompt('What does a Vector DB query look like for an FTE question?')
sendPrompt('What Cypher query retrieves FTE relationships from Neo4j?')
sendPrompt('What does the Metastore return for a cost query — raw numbers?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent merge graph, vector, and raw data into one answer?')
sendPrompt('What does the planned vs actual FTE chart look like in the UI?')
sendPrompt('What does a text cost summary answer look like?')
